tree.name: Terance Mann
tree.tradeDescription: 3-team trade: ATL traded Terance Mann and Drake Powell to BKN; ATL traded Georges Niang and 2031 2nd (CLE own) to BOS; BKN traded cash to BOS; BOS traded Kristaps Porzingis to ATL. Boston also received a trade exception.
tree.note: Versatile wing, 2021 playoff hero vs Utah. BKN received Mann and Drake Powell as part of facilitating Porzingis move to Atlanta.

assetsGivenUp.name: Cash considerations
assetsGivenUp.note: BKN sent cash to Boston Celtics to facilitate the 3-team Porzingis trade.
